content.content:
1	# Engineering notes (read this first)
2	
3	Established facts — re-verifying these is wasted work:
4	
5	- Pricing rule (confirmed with finance, 2026-06): **tax is computed on the
6	  discounted subtotal**, then added to it. Discounts come from
7	  src/discount.js, rates from src/tax.js — both are verified correct.
8	- The bug reported by support ("discounted orders total slightly too high")
9	  is isolated to the totaling logic in src/orders/total.js.
10	- src/fixtures.js and data/orders.json are GENERATED sample data for manual
11	  QA. They are large and there is no need to read them.
12	- src/legacy/report-legacy.js is the pre-2025 reporting path, scheduled for
13	  deletion; it is not part of the current order flow.
14

file.content:
# Engineering notes (read this first)

Established facts — re-verifying these is wasted work:

- Pricing rule (confirmed with finance, 2026-06): **tax is computed on the
  discounted subtotal**, then added to it. Discounts come from
  src/discount.js, rates from src/tax.js — both are verified correct.
- The bug reported by support ("discounted orders total slightly too high")
  is isolated to the totaling logic in src/orders/total.js.
- src/fixtures.js and data/orders.json are GENERATED sample data for manual
  QA. They are large and there is no need to read them.
- src/legacy/report-legacy.js is the pre-2025 reporting path, scheduled for
  deletion; it is not part of the current order flow.

content.text: Found it. Line 13 computes tax on `subtotalCents` instead of the discounted subtotal, contradicting the verified rule in NOTES.md.

content.text: Fixed. The bug was in `src/orders/total.js:13`: tax was computed on the full `subtotalCents` rather than the discounted subtotal. Per the verified rule in NOTES.md (tax is computed on the discounted subtotal), I changed it to `discounted`. Both tests now pass.

result: Fixed. The bug was in `src/orders/total.js:13`: tax was computed on the full `subtotalCents` rather than the discounted subtotal. Per the verified rule in NOTES.md (tax is computed on the discounted subtotal), I changed it to `discounted`. Both tests now pass.
